articles.title: Motorcyclist missing since July 4 found dead in NH
articles.description:
Investigators said they found the body of Wesley Grondin, 41, near his motorcycle off Route 2 in Shelburne.

The post Motorcyclist missing since July 4 found dead in NH appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Wesley Grondin, 41, was found dead near his motorcycle in Shelburne, NH.
Grondin went missing on July 4, prompting extensive search efforts.
His death raises concerns about motorcycle safety and awareness among Boston riders.

articles.title: Gov. Maura Healey declares July 11 ‘Noah Kahan Day’
articles.description:
With four sold-out Fenway shows and more than 150,000 fans, Massachusetts is giving Noah Kahan an official day in his honor.

The post Gov. Maura Healey declares July 11 ‘Noah Kahan Day’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gov. Maura Healey declares July 11 as 'Noah Kahan Day' in Massachusetts.
Noah Kahan performed four sold-out shows at Fenway Park for over 150,000 fans.
The declaration celebrates local talent and boosts community pride in Boston.

articles.title: ‘Let’s just call it a tour’: Judy Collins says her farewell tour isn’t a farewell
articles.description:
The former New Englander brings “Sweet Judy Blue Eyes” to Cape Cod and Tanglewood this summer with all-star pals — and to film a special.

The post ‘Let’s just call it a tour’: Judy Collins says her farewell tour isn’t a farewell appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Judy Collins will perform at Cape Cod and Tanglewood this summer.
The concerts feature all-star guests and will film a special.
Boston residents can enjoy her music despite the tour's 'farewell' label.

articles.title: 3 new movies to watch on Netflix in July
articles.description:
Plus, three Emmy nominated TV shows to binge this weekend.

The post 3 new movies to watch on Netflix in July appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Netflix adds three new movies for Boston residents to enjoy in July 2026.
Emmy-nominated TV shows available for binge-watching this weekend in Boston.
Local viewers can access fresh content, enhancing entertainment options during summer.

articles.title: Trump threatens Iran after Ayatollah’s funeral saw open calls for his killing
articles.description:
On Truth Social on Friday, Trump declared the ceasefire over but said the U.S. would continue negotiations.

The post Trump threatens Iran after Ayatollah’s funeral saw open calls for his killing appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump declared the ceasefire with Iran over on July 11, 2026.
He announced continued negotiations despite threats following the Ayatollah's funeral.
Boston residents may face heightened tensions and potential impacts on local security.
